My Profile: View and edit personal information (full name, DOB, gender, nationality, marital status)
Update contact details (personal email, phone, current address, permanent address)
Manage emergency contacts (multiple with name, relationship, phone, priority order)
Bank details management (add/update account, IBAN, SWIFT, set primary for salary)
Dependent information (spouse, children, parents — for benefits and tax declarations)
Profile photo upload with crop and resize tool
Personal ID section (national ID, passport, visa, driving license — with expiry tracking)
Employment summary (DOJ, designation, department, grade, manager, tenure calculator)
Skills and interests section (self-declared skills, languages, hobbies — for internal matching)
Profile completeness indicator with suggestions to reach 100%
Edit history (all profile changes with timestamps)
Document Vault: View documents organized by category (contracts, identity, financial, certificates, letters)
Download any document (offer letter, salary revisions, payslips, tax forms)
Upload personal documents (scanned IDs, certificates, visa copies — with category tagging)
Document expiry alerts (visa in 60 days, ID renewal, certification lapsing)
Secure encrypted access (employee and authorized HR only)
Bulk download as ZIP for personal record-keeping
Mobile upload directly from phone camera
Org Chart Explorer: Interactive visual org chart from CEO to individual contributors
Click any person for profile card (name, role, department, email, phone)
Navigate up (manager, skip-level), down (peers' reports), sideways (peers)
Dotted-line and matrix reporting relationships visible
Search by name, department, or designation within org chart
Filter by department, location, or entity
Vacant positions shown as dotted-border nodes
Export org chart as PDF or image
Payslip & Tax: Monthly payslip view (gross, basic, allowances, deductions, employer contributions, net pay)
Download payslips as PDF (individual or bulk for the year)
Annual tax summary (total earnings, deductions, tax paid, Form 16/W-2 equivalent)
Year-to-date earnings tracker (running gross, deductions, tax totals)
Salary structure breakdown (visual pie chart of composition)
Tax declaration submission (investment declarations, rent receipts, HRA claims)
Employer contribution visibility (PF, gratuity, insurance — full CTC view)
Benefits Enrollment: Browse all available benefit plans (health, dental, vision, life, retirement, wellness)
Plan comparison view (side-by-side tiers with coverage, premiums, copays)
Enroll during open enrollment window with countdown timer
Life event enrollment triggers (marriage, child birth, adoption)
Manage dependents for coverage (add/remove with documentation)
Cost impact calculator (per-paycheck deduction preview before enrolling)
Digital benefits ID card accessible from mobile
Claims history view with status and amounts
Self-Service Requests: Employment verification letter (auto-generated with letterhead, digital signature, QR verification code)
NOC generation (for visa, travel, education — multiple templates by purpose)
Experience letter request (auto-generates with tenure, designation, performance summary)
Salary certificate request (for loans, visa, tenancy — auto-populated from payroll)
Name change request (with supporting documents, triggers update across all systems)
Bank account change request (new details with verification doc, routed to payroll)
Address change request (self-service with proof if required)
Request tracking dashboard (status of all pending requests with SLA timers)
Contractor Self-Service: Contractor profile with contract dates, scope of work, billing rate, and engagement type
Contract renewal tracking with expiry alerts
Timesheet and invoice submission for contractors
Limited access scope (only relevant modules visible)
Multi-Language Support: Interface language selection (English, Arabic, Hindi, Spanish, French, German, Mandarin, Portuguese)
RTL layout support for Arabic and Hebrew
Localized date, number, and currency formats per user preference
Policy documents available in multiple languages

AI Profile Assistant: 'When does my visa expire?' 'What's my remaining probation?' — instant answers from your data
Proactive alerts for upcoming expirations and milestones
Natural language queries about any personal HR data
Benefits Recommender: Suggests optimal plan selections based on profile, family status, usage patterns
Cost-benefit comparison personalized to your situation
Alerts during enrollment window if better options exist
Smart Document Search: Natural language: 'Find my last appraisal letter' → retrieves correct document
Search across all documents regardless of file name or category
Fuzzy matching for partial or approximate queries
Tax Optimization Hints: Suggests tax-saving declarations based on salary structure and local tax law
Investment options recommended for maximum tax benefit
Alerts before declaration deadlines with estimated savings

Team Directory: Full team roster with role, tenure, location, contact info, reporting chain
Quick filters (by location, grade, employment type, tenure range)
Team size history chart (how team has grown/shrunk over time)
Export team list to Excel with selected fields
Team Org Management: View current team structure in org chart format
Propose org changes (transfers, promotions, reporting line changes) with approval workflow
View impact of proposed changes before submitting (affects on spans, structure)
Track status of submitted org change requests
Compensation Overview: Team salary summary (bands, compa-ratios, band positioning per member — within access rights)
Bonus eligibility and target overview per team member
Equity vesting schedules and grant status (where applicable)
Historical comp changes for each team member
Headcount Tracking: Open requisitions with stage and ETA
Planned vs actual cost per head
Team Compliance: Track certifications and mandatory training completion per member
Visa expiration dashboard with renewal countdown
Probation milestone tracker (confirmation due dates, review scheduling)
Letter & Change Requests: Initiate salary changes, promotions, transfers, role changes for team members
Approval workflow with justification and budget impact documentation
View status of all submitted requests
Generate and send letters (promotion, transfer) after approval
Blended Workforce View: Unified team roster showing FTEs, contractors, and interns in one view
Engagement type filter and distinct visual indicators
Contract expiry calendar for contingent workers
Contractor performance tracking with simplified review forms
Org Modeling: What-if org structure simulator (drag-and-drop team restructuring)
Impact analysis: span of control changes, cost implications, reporting chain effects
Propose changes with approval workflow — applied only after approval

Team Insights Brief: AI-generated monthly summary: tenure distribution, upcoming milestones, compliance gaps, org health
Highlights changes since last month (new joiners, exits, role changes)
Proactive alerts for items needing attention
Org Design Suggestions: 'Your team has 12 direct reports — research suggests 7±2. Consider creating a sub-team.'
Suggests optimal structures based on team size, function, and industry benchmarks
Models impact of proposed restructuring on reporting load and communication flow
Comp Equity Alerts: Flags pay disparities within team by role, tenure, or demographics for proactive review
Shows compa-ratio outliers with suggested adjustments
Benchmarks team comp against market and internal peers
Succession Readiness: AI assesses team member readiness for critical/leadership roles
Scores based on skills, performance trajectory, tenure, and development activities
Identifies gaps and recommends development actions per candidate

Employee Master Data: Complete employee records management with all standard and custom fields
Custom field creation per entity (add country-specific fields, industry-specific fields)
Data import/export in bulk (Excel, CSV) with field mapping
Deduplication engine (identify and merge duplicate records)
Mass update capability (change department for 50 employees at once)
Multi-Entity Setup: Configure legal entities across countries (name, registration, tax ID, address)
Entity-level policy separation (different leave policies per country entity)
Department and cost center mapping per entity
Grade and designation framework per entity or shared across entities
Inter-entity transfer workflows with data migration
Payroll Engine: Multi-country payroll processing with country-specific tax calculations
Statutory deduction configuration (PF, ESI, GOSI, Social Security, etc.)
Arrears calculation and processing (back-dated salary changes)
Reversal and correction workflows for payroll errors
Payslip generation and distribution (email, portal, bulk PDF)
Payroll calendar management (cutoff dates, processing dates, payment dates)
Integration with banking for salary transfers (WPS for UAE, NEFT for India)
Benefits Administration: Configure benefit plans with eligibility rules (by grade, tenure, entity)
Vendor integrations (insurance companies, retirement fund managers)
Open enrollment period configuration with auto-notifications
Life event trigger rules for mid-cycle enrollment
Compliance Management: Labor law compliance tracking per jurisdiction
Statutory reporting (PF returns, ESI, GOSI, WPS, P60, W-2 — auto-generated)
Document retention policy configuration and enforcement
Mandatory training tracking with escalation for non-compliance
Data Governance: Field-level access controls (who can see salary, national ID, bank details)
PII encryption at rest and in transit
GDPR consent management (employee consent tracking, right to erasure workflows)
Complete audit log of every data mutation (who, when, what, old value, new value)
Data export and portability tools for compliance requests
Multi-Entity Management: Manage multiple legal entities from single instance with entity-level data isolation
Entity-specific policy configuration with inheritance from parent
Inter-entity transfer workflow with compliance handling
Contractor Lifecycle Management: Contractor onboarding workflow (separate from employee onboarding)
Contract management with version control and renewal tracking
Contractor billing rate and invoice management
Auto-classification checker (contractor vs employee per jurisdiction rules)
Contractor offboarding with access revocation and IP handover
Custom Field Engine: Create unlimited custom fields per module (text, number, date, dropdown, multi-select, file)
Conditional field visibility rules (show field X only if field Y equals Z)
Custom fields available in reports, workflows, and API
Field-level permissions (who can view/edit each custom field)

AI Org Designer: Suggests optimal structures from performance data, collaboration patterns, and cost data
Models impact of restructuring (reporting load, communication overhead, cost changes)
Benchmarks against industry-standard org shapes for company size and stage
Smart Document Parser: OCR + NLP auto-extracts fields from uploaded ID cards, contracts, certificates
Auto-populates employee records from scanned documents
Supports multiple languages and document formats
Confidence scores per extracted field with manual review for low-confidence items
Payroll Anomaly Detection: Flags calculation errors, unusual amounts, and policy violations before payroll finalizes
Compares current month to historical patterns per employee
Detects duplicate payments, missed deductions, incorrect tax calculations
Pre-audit report with severity classification before processing
Predictive Compliance: Monitors regulatory changes globally and predicts impact on your policies per jurisdiction
Alerts when new legislation requires policy updates
Estimates effort and cost of compliance changes
Suggests policy modifications to stay ahead of regulatory shifts
Smart Entity Setup: When adding a new entity/country, AI pre-configures all statutory requirements
Suggests policy adjustments based on local labor law and entity characteristics
Migration assistant for employee transfers between entities
